generation.image_prompt: Mystical 1900s lithography tarot card illustration. Clean bold black ink outlines. 2:3 vertical. A beautiful, soulful anthropomorphic leopard cat sitting on a throne decorated with sea-shells and aquatic life by the edge of a crystal stream. She holds a large, highly ornate cup with handles in the shape of angels. Calm, reflective and deep-water blues. High-fidelity leopard cat features (forehead stripes, ear spots). Full bleed. No borders.
generation.narrative: The Queen of Cups is 'The Intuitive Protectress'—the mature female leopard cat that embodies the wisdom and emotional depth of the forest waters.

meanings.upright: Compassion, emotional stability, intuition, a caring nature, and spiritual insight.
meanings.reversed: Emotional insecurity, martyrdom, dependence, or a disconnection from intuition.

ecology.risk_theme: the deep wisdom of local survival
ecology.mapping_note: Queen of Cups represents 'The Maternal Core'—the crucial survival instincts of a mother leopard cat that has mastered the safe navigation of the landscape.

website.excerpt: Gazing into the ornate golden cup, the Queen reads the secrets of the forest waters and the hearts of all who dwell there.
website.seo_description: Queen of Cups reimagined as a soulful leopard cat on a shell-decorated throne.
